notes: Trinity Governor Watchdog v0.1 example config. Operators may
load this with --config and override individual fields with the
matching CLI flag. CLI flags always win over the file.
v0.1 invariants the config CANNOT override:
- The watchdog is read-only on decisions_dir. No mode in the
config can turn it into a writer.
- --send + a webhook_url do not actually fetch anything in
v0.1. The flag plus URL are recorded in the report for the
future watchdog daemon sprint, but the URL is host-redacted
and never reached over the network.
- decisions_dir whose basename or any path segment matches a
